case_title: THE CITY TOW VS PAHULU, WATSON PALAVI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT PAHULU, WATSON PALAVI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERTIFIED MAIL TO WATSON PALAVI PAHULU RETURNED SIGNED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAHULU, WATSON PALAVI PLTF FAILED TO APPEAR AT TIME CASE WAS CALLED. PLTF APPEARED AFTER DEFT LEFT COURT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW HEARING SET FOR APR-04-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-04-1995, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAHULU, WATSON PALAVI DIMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
